generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local civil defense drill in my town. It was impressive how organized they were, but honestly, I was surprised how many people didn't know basic emergency protocols. We need to invest more in preparedness education. It's not about fear—it's about being ready for anything. #CommunitySafety #PreparednessMatters
